DECLARATION OF GLEN STEVICK IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFFS OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL MOLONEY, INC.S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100050886) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRUZ-QUINTANA, JOSE MANUEL ANTONELLI, ROBERT AN INDIVIDUAL RENDON, FRANCES AN INDIVIDUAL

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CENTRAL MOLONEY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE DECLARATION OF GLEN STEVICK CREATES TRIABLE DISPUTES WHETHER THE INJURIES TO PLAINTIFF JOSE CRUZ-QUINTANA WERE CAUSED BY THE DEFECTIVE DESIGN OF THE TRANSFORMER AND WHETHER THE TRANSFORMER WAS STATE OF THE ART AT THE TIME IT WAS MANUFACTURED. CENTRAL MOLONEY'S OBJECTIONS TO MR. STEVICK'S DECLARATION ARE OVERRULED. THE OBJECTIONS GO TO THE WEIGHT, NOT THE ADMISSIBILITY, OF MR. STEVICK'S OPINIONS. ORDER IS SIGNED.(SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR#6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant Central Moloney, Incs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alison Cordova, Esq. 650-697-6000 of Cotchett Pitre & McCarthy LLP for Plaintiff.
Jack McCowan Jr. Esq. 415-986-5900 of Gordon Rees LLP for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court shares it's views. Defendant argues re: pressure release valve. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CENTRAL MOLONEY, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.Defendant Central Moloney, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied. The declaration of Glen Stevick creates triable disputes whether the injuries to plaintiff Jose Cruz-Quintana were caused by the defective design of the transformer and whether the transformer was state of the art at the time it was manufactured. Central Moloney's objections to Mr. Stevick's declaration are overruled. The objections go to the weight, not the admissibility, of Mr. Stevick's opinions.

Order is signed.(see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
